texto: Impeachment must not be a raw exercise of political power in which the House impeaches whoever it wishes for any reason it deems sufficient. Indeed, it is the solemn duty of all of the members of the House in any impeachment case to exercise their judgment faithfully within the confines established by our Constitution.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Charles T. Canady sobre temas ligados a fe. A afirmação “Impeachment must not be a raw exercise of political power in which the House impeaches whoever it…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, constitution, political, útil em momentos de political.

texto: The Supreme Court has in place a legal structure which protects abortion rights in this country, and something has got to be done to change that before we can put in place truly meaningful protection for the unborn.
explicacao: Citação de Charles T. Canady sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The Supreme Court has in place a legal structure which protects abortion rights in this country, …” articula reflexao, change, meaningful em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e meaningful.

texto: Families are not merely constructs of outdated convention, and traditional marriage laws were not based on animosity toward homosexuals. Rather, I believe that the traditional family structure - centered on a lawful union between one man and one woman - comports with nature and with our Judeo-Christian moral tradition.
explicacao: Citação de Charles T. Canady sobre temas ligados a familia. “Families are not merely constructs of outdated convention, and traditional marriage laws were not…” articula familia, family, nature em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como casamento e nature.
